stemHtml:
Refer to figure or VFR Chart ED-4 from Jeppesen GSPRM 2017. 
An aircraft is on a VFR flight in Austria. The departure airfield is Ried Kirchheim (LOLK, N48°12.8' E13°20.8') and the destination is Freistadt (LOLF, N48°30.9' E14°24.5'). Which of the following radio frequencies should be used as a radio navigation aid if the pilot intends to fly directly to the destination?
